candidates.prompt:
Use case: style-transfer
Asset type: isolated Beyblade material-tone candidate
Input images: Image 1 is the edit target and absolute authority for geometry; Image 2 is the sole style reference.
Primary request: render only the visible FLAME METAL WHEEL from Image 1: the outer silver metal wheel, the exposed gray frame beneath the clear wheel, and gray connectors. Match Image 2's restrained illustrated cel-shading, gray palette, narrow controlled highlights, and crisp dark-gray boundary contrast.
Composition/framing: preserve Image 1's exact front-view orientation, placement, scale, silhouette, holes, grooves, tips, and part boundaries.
Scene/backdrop: replace every non-target pixel with perfectly flat solid #ff00ff.
Constraints: do not change or redraw geometry; no new lines; no text; no stickers; no green or yellow parts; no background; no glow; no airbrushing; no wide white light bands; no black bloom; no asymmetrical lighting; no watermark. Keep the target metal fully separated from the magenta background with crisp edges.

Use case: style-transfer
Asset type: isolated Beyblade material-tone candidate
Input images: Image 1 is the edit target and absolute authority for geometry; Image 2 is the sole style reference.
Primary request: render only the visible LIBRA CLEAR WHEEL from Image 1: the yellow-green annular wheel, four mounts, slots, teeth, and the 12/6 o'clock flame ornaments. Match Image 2's muted olive yellow-green palette, restrained translucent-plastic illustration, discrete cel-shaded tone bands, and crisp dark-olive internal boundaries.
Composition/framing: preserve Image 1's exact front-view orientation, placement, scale, silhouette, holes, grooves, and part boundaries.
Scene/backdrop: replace every non-target pixel with perfectly flat solid #ff00ff.
Constraints: do not change or redraw geometry; no new lines; no text; preserve no sticker pixels in this candidate; no metal or yellow face bolt; no background; no fluorescent lime; no white glow; no airbrushing; no broad blurred highlights; no black bloom; no asymmetrical lighting; no watermark. Keep the target clear-wheel pixels fully separated from the magenta background with crisp edges.

adoption_policy: comparison_only; adopt no geometry, alpha, text, or background; adopt tone only when it reduces aligned-reference error and all fixed-rule checks pass
result: both candidates rejected because direct aligned-reference transfer had lower error
